briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions of the DFU specific functions to be used in USB boot mode.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 bsv 02/10/2019 First release bsv 04/09/2020 Code clean up 1.01 bsv 07/08/2020 Moved Ch9Handler APIs from xloader_usb.c td 08/19/2020 Fixed MISRA C violations Rule 10.3 bsv 10/13/2020 Code clean up td 10/19/2020 MISRA C Fixes 1.02 bsv 08/31/2021 Code clean up 1.03 kpt 12/13/2021 Replaced Xil_SecureMemCpy with Xil_SMemCpy 1.04 sk 03/13/24 Fixed doxygen comments format 2.4 aa 04/01/2026 Added DDR address range validation during USB DFU download to prevent buffer overflow aa 04/10/2026 Update DDR overflow check for USB DFU
